name_en: OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 Clutch Suede 2024/25 High-End Atelier Hangzhou Show Runway Style! Double leather flap clutch is truly eye-catching! The cowhide handle with a snap buckle adds elegance and nobility, and it's also very practical. Its capacity is large enough to meet daily needs. The handbag is a treasure item. It shows your taste and meets your daily needs. Worn, it is exquisite, special, and beautiful!! Length 33 Width 12 Height 18
